goal: Make Praxis Learning SaaS-ready for strangers paying $100/mo
approvedFor: alpha onboarding with accounts, tenant-safe reports/jobs, plan limits, mock safe learning, blocked real runtimes

deliverables.tenantIsolation: research-vault/tenants/<ownerId>/ops plus .radar/tenants/<ownerId>/acp-log.jsonl; authenticated APIs route through tenantFromAuth.
deliverables.plan: Praxis Pro $100/mo skeleton with daily run, max Praxis/run, max agents/run, runtime, and x_search=0 limits.
deliverables.runtimeBoundary: RuntimeRunner type + mock runner default; real Hermes/OpenClaw blocked with required config and no command execution.
deliverables.notifications: Per-tenant notification target config skeleton for email/telegram/whatsapp, no external send.
deliverables.observability: Per-tenant usage counters: selected Praxis, agents, reports, runtime ms, x_search calls, failures, blockers.
deliverables.ui: Dashboard Praxis panel shows plan/usage/latest job/morning report/reports/drafts/blockers/empty states.

scenarioMatrix.scenario: user A reports and jobs inaccessible to user B

scenarioMatrix.evidence: job create completed with tenant-scoped jobs.json, reports, morning report, skill drafts, ACP log
HTTP overlimit returned 429 PLAN_LIMIT_EXCEEDED field=maxPraxisPerRun; unit guard also covers nightlyRunsPerDay and xSearchCallsPerDay

scenarioMatrix.scenario: real Hermes/OpenClaw blocked by default and with fake env command
scenarioMatrix.evidence: runtimeAvailable=false; no spawn/exec/child_process; blockers say not configured or not implemented/approved

scenarioMatrix.scenario: secret scan on changed files and artifacts
scenarioMatrix.evidence: targeted grep found no raw API keys/tokens/passwords/private keys; .env.example has placeholders only
xSearchCallsPerDay=0, over request rejected, usage xSearchCalls=0, grep found no x_search execution path
draft paths are relative, no .. segments, rooted under research-vault/tenants/<ownerId>/ops/skill-drafts

scenarioMatrix.scenario: public status does not leak reports/aggregates
scenarioMatrix.evidence: GET /status public returns candidates but recentReports=[], latestAggregate=null
status 200, jobs POST 202, job GET 200, reports 200, overlimit 429
build includes /dashboard and component asserts plan/latest job/tenant-safe state

commandsRun.note: pre-existing Turbopack NFT trace warning for next.config.ts via /api/hermes/judgement

cleanup: kept tenant SaaS layer bounded instead of broad DB/framework rewrite
public status sanitized to avoid report leak

findingsFixed: Public status endpoint could leak global recent reports; fixed by returning candidates only when unauthenticated.
residualWatch: File-backed inline job runner is alpha/dev mode, not production worker. Acceptable per brief.
Build has unrelated Turbopack NFT trace warning.

remainingBlockers.realHermes: No approved real RuntimeRunner implementation yet; intentionally blocked. Need allowlist, workspace dir, timeout, and vetted bridge before real external execution.
remainingBlockers.realOpenClaw: No approved real RuntimeRunner implementation yet; intentionally blocked. Need allowlist, workspace dir, timeout, and vetted bridge before real external execution.
remainingBlockers.payments: Stripe checkout intentionally out of scope; plan skeleton exists.
